canonical_name: The dark shape who had forbidden her the road
the Death-crone who guards the doors of the forbidden
the High Kings of all Britain
the shores of Avalon, Morgaine wearing the robes of a priestess
that man whom his sworn king, Ambrosius, had marked for the defense of all Britain
the realms of darkness whence you came
some foul fiend from the darkness
a land no darker than the Summer Country
a land no darker than the Summer Country, and look, these men with me
mortal men who are cold and weary
the soldiers here in the hall
the chamber she had shared with Gorlois
a roof since Samhain-the good Father down there
the little one I saw downstairs
such women as could be had for the asking
such women as could be had for the asking, and that a chaste woman of his own station
a chaste woman of his own station
the Old People, who were here long before ever the Romans came to these isles
King Ban of Benwick in Less Britain
the land he was sworn to defend
